import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if string.len(cur) > 0
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(cur) > 0
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut idx = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  while idx < m
    if idx % 2 == 0
      let v = match nums.get(idx)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
